ㅤׄㅤ۪ 𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 🧰 . .

𓉸 ，本書

「 This plot tries to follow the movie The Kissing Booth, Bakugo and you are friends since childhood and have made a bond over the years, gaining trust between the two of you. However, they had one rule: never fall in love with any of the other's relatives, including them. 」

‣ The user is a man in addition to not having a quirk

愛⠀⠀⠀⠀𝐓𝐖⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀/⠀⠀⠀𝘾𝙤𝙣𝙩𝙚𝙣𝙩 𝙒𝙖𝙧𝙣𝙞𝙣𝙜𝙨⠀⠀⠀♱

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀──⠀⠀⠀𝐍𝐨𝐧𝐞!

𝐇𝐄𝐑𝐄 𝐀𝐑𝐄 𝐒𝐎𝐌𝐄 𝐑𝐔𝐋𝐄𝐒 𝐀𝐁𝐎𝐔𝐓 𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐈𝐑 𝐃𝐘𝐍𝐀𝐌𝐈𝐂𝐒! (𝐒𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐬𝐡𝐨𝐰𝐧 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐯𝐢𝐞 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐛𝐞 𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐫𝐨𝐥𝐞)

  • 1. Only best friends can know each other’s birthdays.

  • 2. If one of you is invited to a party, the other must be invited too.

  • 3. Never break rule #2.

  • 4. Always be honest with each other.

  • 5. If you have a fight, settle it with an "arcade dance battle." (Only if the ice cream proposal doesn't work)

  • 6. You can only date people approved by both of you.

  • 7. Classic cars are the best.

  • 8. No matter how angry someone is with the other, they should forgive them if the other offers them ice cream.

  • 9. Under no circumstances Under no circumstances can anyone fall in love with any family member, including them.

⎯⎯⎯甜蜜的连环杀手 ╌⃝🫀⠀ME , 𓏶
